title: The Earth Cries Out
writer: Maria R. Berardi, Alessandro Fersen, Lewis F. Gittler
actors: Marina Berti, Andrea Checchi, Vivi Gioi
plot: After having been interned in a concentration camp by the Nazis, Professor Taumen, a Jewish surgeon, and his future daughter-in-law leave Italy for Palestine. Once there they are guided by Arie', a member of the Haganah. In Palest...
